data.body:
WORKFLOW ENGINE V2 EPIC (e6d9 / hump-seam-spice) — build session handoff.

DELIVERED 6/8 stories, each independently code-reviewed (subagent) before close, all on main (commits 2b38ad5d..fa5dd11a), full suite 2372 passed / 11 skipped (live-only):
- b44a (2b38ad5d): v2 declarative IR — schemas/workflow.v2.schema.json (branch/loop/map, additionalProperties:false, oneOf one-discriminator, mandatory loop max_iterations, while/until mutually exclusive); lint split into lint_refs.py (frame-scoped reference linter: per-frame acyclic needs, loop.<var>/map.<as> bindings, same-frame precedence) + lint.py (secret/prompt/collector); migrate.py v1->v2 shim. v1 & v2 schemas frozen by golden hashes (test_workflow_schema_golden.py).
- dbc6 (07edefbf): interpreter.py — recursive worklist (branch/loop/map), run-state on the event log, frame-key (run_id,step_id,iteration) idempotency markers, exactly-once replay across every crash point. Synchronous (Burr tripwire armed). reducer _processors.py keys WORKFLOW_STEP by frame_key.
- 8d8e (4fab656f): map_fanout.py — bounded-concurrent map (the ONE tripwire relaxation; ThreadPoolExecutor isolated here); rc.lock/_guard serialize ALL commits + shared-state writes; agent calls overlap.
- 00da (f628df05): bpmn.py — lossless IR<->BPMN 2.0 serializer + rebar.moddle.json descriptor (extension survival). Structure->BPMN element types; exact config in <rebar:Config>; deterministic DI; visual format never committed.
- 7d58 (75e598a4): runner.py PydanticAIRunner (provider-agnostic, model-string only) + pai_tools.py (FS/MCP/rebar tools reusing hardened shared helpers) + parity.py (non-inferiority parity bar w/ gold-coverage guard). pyproject [agents]+=pydantic-ai-slim,json-repair. PromptedOutput (POC-proven). RUNNERS+=pydantic_ai; default still langgraph.
- 1268 (b82d23f6): structured.py — 4-layer stack: output_mode (Native/Prompted, never forced-tool under thinking) + tolerant_parse (json-repair, first-object-wins) + Pydantic normalizing validators (bounds in validators not schema; CompletionVerdict fail-safe verdict, Finding confidence clamp) + bounded retry; check_stop_reason wired (refusal/length/content_filter/error -> error before parse). Second-interpreter LLM removed.

OPEN (NOT force-closed, per Joe):
- 744b (8b16a0ee): editor.py — 'rebar workflow edit <file>' serves bpmn-js host over the serializer; Save round-trips BPMN->IR (un-mappable rejected, .bak backup, IR-only writes). Security: loopback bind + per-session X-Rebar-Token + Host check (CSRF/rebinding), XXE-blocked. 9 offline tests. GATE: Joe validates the in-browser edit round-trip before closing the epic.
- d6d1: new runtime LIVE-validated (real Anthropic review through the full stack caught add()=subtraction). Parity harness built+tested. GATE: comparative parity (PydanticAI vs LangGraph) on the >=20-gold corpus before removing langchain/langgraph + switching default + OTel->Langfuse [tracing] re-home + docs. Not runnable offline (langgraph not installed; gold corpus absent; ~120 funded calls). Nothing removed yet.

TEST-QUALITY PASS (813dd5c8, fa5dd11a): independent test review -> closed coverage gaps + removed change-detectors (see per-ticket comments). PRODUCTION BUG FIXED: interpreter with-resolution error now fails the step gracefully instead of crashing run_workflow (regression from 8d8e's lock move; v1 contract restored).

NEXT ACTIONS: (1) browser-validate 744b -> close. (2) run parity bar with both stacks + gold corpus; if it clears, execute d6d1 cutover -> close. (3) remediation epic 6f2d (soupy-spool-revel) depends_on this epic.
